verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ መቅሠፍት ፡ ወነበቦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለእልዓዛር ፡ ካህን ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And it came to pass after the plague, that the Lord spoke to Moses and Eleazar the priest, saying,
translations.kjv: And it came to pass after the plague, that the LORD spake unto Moses and unto Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest, saying,

verses.geez:
ንሣእ ፡ እምጥንቱ ፡ አኀዝ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ተዓይኒሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ዘእምዕሥራ ፡ ዓም ፡ ወላዕሉ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ በበ
                  ፡ አብያተ ፡ አበዊሆሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘይወፅእ ፡ ፀብአ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: Take the sum of all the congregation of the children of Israel, from twenty years old and upward, according to the houses of their lineage, every one that goes forth to battle in Israel.
translations.kjv: Take the sum of all the congregation of the children of Israel, from twenty years old and upward, throughout their fathers’ house, all that are able to go to war in Israel.

verses.geez:
ወነገርዎሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወእልዓዛር ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ በአራቦት ፡ ዘሞአብ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ኢያሪኮ ፡
                  ወይቤልዎሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And Moses and Eleazar the priest spoke in Araboth of Moab at the Jordan by Jericho, saying,
translations.kjv: And Moses and Eleazar the priest spake with them in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho, saying,

verses.geez:
ዘእም፳ዓም ፡ ወላዕሉ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤልሰ ፡ እለ ፡ ወፅኡ ፡
                  እምግብጽ ፤

translations.lxx: This is the numbering from twenty years old and upward as the Lord commanded Moses. And the sons of Israel that came out of Egypt are as follows:
translations.kjv: Take the sum of the people, from twenty years old and upward; as the LORD commanded Moses and the children of Israel, which went forth out of the land of Egypt.

verses.geez: ሮቤል ፡ በኵሩ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወደቂቀ ፡ ሮቤል ፡ ሄኖኅ ፡ ወነገደ ፡ ሄኖኅ ፤ ዘፈሉ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ፈሉይ ።

translations.lxx: Ruben was the first-born of Israel: and the sons of Ruben, Enoch, and the family of Enoch; to Phallu belongs the family of the Phalluites.
translations.kjv: Reuben, the eldest son of Israel: the children of Reuben; Hanoch, of whom cometh the family of the Hanochites: of Pallu, the family of the Palluites:

verses.geez: ወዘአስሮንሂ ፡ ነገደ ፡ አስሮኒ ፡ ወዘካርም ፡ ነገደ ፡ ካርሚ ።

translations.lxx: To Asron, the family of Asroni: to Charmi, the family of Charmi.
translations.kjv: Of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites: of Carmi, the family of the Carmites.

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘሮቤል ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ፬፻-፻፴፻፯፻፴ ።

translations.lxx: These are the families of Ruben; and their numbering was forty-three thousand and seven hundred and thirty.
translations.kjv: These are the families of the Reubenites: and they that were numbered of them were forty and three thousand and seven hundred and thirty.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ፈሉ ፡ ኤሊያብ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Phallu were Eliab,—
translations.kjv: And the sons of Pallu; Eliab.

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ ኤሊያብ ፡ ናሙኤል ፡ ወዳታን ፡ ወአቤሮን ፡ እሉ ፡ ዐበይተ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ እለ ፡ ቆሙ ፡
                  ላዕለ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንተ ፡ ቆሬ ፡ አመ ፡ ተቃወሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: and the sons of Eliab, Namuel, and Dathan, and Abiron: these are renowned men of the congregation; these are they that rose up against Moses and Aaron in the gathering of Core, in the rebellion against the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Eliab; Nemuel, and Dathan, and Abiram. This is that Dathan and Abiram, which were famous in the congregation, who strove against Moses and against Aaron in the company of Korah, when they strove against the LORD:

verses.geez:
ወአብቀወት ፡ አፉሃ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወውሕ[ጠቶ]ሙ ፡ ወለቆሬሂ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ ወትዕይንቲሆሙኒ ፡ አመ ፡ በልዐቶሙ ፡ እሳት ፡
                  ፪፻፶ወኮኑ ፡ ለተአምር ።

translations.lxx: And the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed up them and Core, when their assembly perished, when the fire devoured the two hundred and fifty, and they were made a sign.
translations.kjv: And the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed them up together with Korah, when that company died, what time the fire devoured two hundred and fifty men: and they became a sign.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ቆሬሰ ፡ ኢሞቱ ።

translations.lxx: But the sons of Core died not.
translations.kjv: Notwithstanding the children of Korah died not.

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ ስምዖንሂ ፡ ወዘናሙሔልሂ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ናሙሔሊ ፡ ወዘኢያምንሂ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡
                  ኢያምኒ ፡ ወዘኢያክንሂ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኢያክኒ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Symeon:—the family of the sons of Symeon: to Namuel, belonged the family of the Namuelites; to Jamin the family of the Jaminites; to Jachin the family of the Jachinites.
translations.kjv: The sons of Simeon after their families: of Nemuel, the family of the Nemuelites: of Jamin, the family of the Jaminites: of Jachin, the family of the Jachinites:

verses.geez: ወዘዘራሂ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዘራይ ፡ ወዘሳውልሂ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሳውል ።

translations.lxx: To Zara the family of the Zaraites; to Saul the family of the Saulites.
translations.kjv: Of Zerah, the family of the Zarhites: of Shaul, the family of the Shaulites.

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘስምዖን ፡ ወኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ፪፻-፻፳፻፪፻ ።

translations.lxx: These are the families of Symeon according to their numbering, two and twenty thousand and two hundred.
translations.kjv: These are the families of the Simeonites, twenty and two thousand and two hundred.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ይሁዳሂ ፡ ዔር ፡ ወአውናን ፡ ወሴሎን ፡ ወፋሬስ ፡ ወዛራ ፡ ወሞቱ ፡ ዔር ፡ ወአውናን ፡ በምድረ ፡ ከናአን ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Juda, Er and Aunan; and Er and Aunan died in the land of Chanaan.
translations.kjv: The children of Gad after their families: of Zephon, the family of the Zephonites: of Haggi, the family of the Haggites: of Shuni, the family of the Shunites:

verses.geez:
ወኮኑ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ይሁዳ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ዘሴሎን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ዘሴሎኒ ፡ ወዘፋሬስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡
                  ፋሬስ ፡ ወዘዛራ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ዛራይ ።

translations.lxx: And these were the sons of Juda, according to their families: to Selom belonged the family of the Selonites; to Phares, the family of the Pharesites; to Zara, the family of the Zaraites.
translations.kjv: Of Ozni, the family of the Oznites: of Eri, the family of the Erites:

verses.geez: ወኮኑ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ፋሬስ ፡ ለአስሮን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ አስሮኒ ፡ ወዘያሙሔልሂ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ያሙሔሊ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Phares were, to Asron, the family of the Asronites; to Jamun, the family of the Jamunites.
translations.kjv: Of Arod, the family of the Arodites: of Areli, the family of the Arelites.

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘይሁዳ ፡ ወኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ፯፻-፻፷፻፭፻ ።

translations.lxx: These are the families of Juda according to their numbering, seventy-six thousand and five hundred.
translations.kjv: These are the families of the children of Gad according to those that were numbered of them, forty thousand and five hundred.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ይስካርሂ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ዘቶላ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ቶላይ ፡ [ዘ]ፎሐ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ፉሓይ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Issachar according to their families: to Thola, the family of the Tholaites; to Phua, the family of the Phuaites.
translations.kjv: The sons of Judah were Er and Onan: and Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan.

verses.geez: ወዘያሱብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ያሱብ ፡ ወዘስምራ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ስምራሚ ።

translations.lxx: To Jasub, the family of the Jasubites; to Samram, the family of the Samramites.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Judah after their families were; of Shelah, the family of the Shelanites: of Pharez, the family of the Pharzites: of Zerah, the family of the Zarhites.

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘይስካር ፡ ወኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ፯፻-፻፵፻፬፻ ።

translations.lxx: These are the families of Issachar according to their numbering, sixty-four thousand and four hundred.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Pharez were; of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites: of Hamul, the family of the Hamulites.

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ ዛቡሎንሂ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ዘሳሬድ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሳሬዲ ፡ ወዘአሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ አሎኒ ፡
                  ወዘአሌል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ነገደ ፡ አሌሊ ።

translations.lxx: The sons of Zabulon according to their families: to Sared, the family of the Saredites; to Allon, the family of the Allonites; to Allel, the family of the Allelites.
translations.kjv: These are the families of Judah according to those that were numbered of them, threescore and sixteen thousand and five hundred.

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘዛቡሎን ፡ ወኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ፯፻-፻[፭]፻ ።

translations.lxx: These are the families of Zabulon according to their numbering, sixty thousand and five hundred.
translations.kjv: Of the sons of Issachar after their families: of Tola, the family of the Tolaites: of Pua, the family of the Punites:

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ጋድሂ ፡ በበሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ዘሳፎን ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሳፎኒ ፡ ወዘሕግ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሕጊ ፡ ወዘሱኒ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሱኒ ።

translations.lxx: The sons of Gad according to their families: to Saphon, the family of the Saphonites; to Angi, the family of the Angites; to Suni, the family of the Sunites;
translations.kjv: Of Jashub, the family of the Jashubites: of Shimron, the family of the Shimronites.

verses.geez: ወዘዐዜን ፡ ነገደ ፡ ዐዜኒ ፡ ወዘሳድ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሳዲ ።

translations.lxx: to Azeni, the family of the Azenites; to Addi, the family of the Addites:
translations.kjv: These are the families of Issachar according to those that were numbered of them, threescore and four thousand and three hundred.

verses.geez: ወዘአሮሐድ ፡ ነገደ ፡ አሮሐዲ ፡ ወዘአሪሔል ፡ ነገደ ፡ አሪሔሊ ።

translations.lxx: to Aroadi, the family of the Aroadites; to Ariel, the family of the Arielites.
translations.kjv: Of the sons of Zebulun after their families: of Sered, the family of the Sardites: of Elon, the family of the Elonites: of Jahleel, the family of the Jahleelites.

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ጋድ ፡ ወኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ፬፻-፻፵፻፭፻ ።

translations.lxx: These are the families of the children of Gad according to their numbering, forty-four thousand and five hundred.
translations.kjv: These are the families of the Zebulunites according to those that were numbered of them, threescore thousand and five hundred.

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ አሴርሂ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ዘኢያምን ፡ ነገደ ፡ ኢያሚን ፡ ወዘኢያሱ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ኢያሱይ ፡ ወዘባርያ ፡
                  ነገደ ፡ ባራዊ ።

translations.lxx: The sons of Aser according to their families; to Jamin, the family of the Jaminites; to Jesu, the family of the Jesusites; to Baria, the family of the Bariaites.
translations.kjv: The sons of Joseph after their families were Manasseh and Ephraim.

verses.geez: ወዘኮቦር ፡ ነገደ ፡ ኮቦሪ ፡ ወዘሜልኪየል ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሜልኪየል ።

translations.lxx: To Chober, the family of the Choberites; to Melchiel, the family of the Melchielites.
translations.kjv: Of the sons of Manasseh: of Machir, the family of the Machirites: and Machir begat Gilead: of Gilead come the family of the Gileadites.

verses.geez: ወስማ ፡ ለወለተ ፡ አሴር ፡ ሳራ ።

translations.lxx: And the name of the daughter of Aser, Sara.
translations.kjv: These are the sons of Gilead: of Jeezer, the family of the Jeezerites: of Helek, the family of the Helekites:

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ አሴር ፡ ወኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ፬፻-፻፴፻፯፻ ።

translations.lxx: These are the families of Aser according to their numbering, forty-three thousand and four hundred.
translations.kjv: And of Asriel, the family of the Asrielites: and of Shechem, the family of the Shechemites:

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ፡ ማናሴ ፡ ወኤፍሬም ።

translations.lxx: The sons of Joseph according to their families, Manasse and Ephraim.
translations.kjv: And of Shemida, the family of the Shemidaites: and of Hepher, the family of the Hepherites.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ማናሴ ፡ ዘማክር ፡ ነገደ ፡ ማኪር ፡ ወማክር ፡ ወለዶ ፡ ለገለአድ ፤

translations.lxx: The sons of Manasse. To Machir the family of the Machirites; and Machir begot Galaad: to Galaad, the family of the Galaadites.
translations.kjv: And Zelophehad the son of Hepher had no sons, but daughters: and the names of the daughters of Zelophehad were Mahlah, and Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.

verses.geez: [ዘ]ገላአድ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ገላአዲ ።

translations.lxx: And these are the sons of Galaad; to Achiezer, the family of the Achiezerites; to Cheleg, the family of the Chelegites.
translations.kjv: These are the families of Manasseh, and those that were numbered of them, fifty and two thousand and seven hundred.

verses.geez:
እሉ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ገላአድ ፡ ዘአኪየዜር ፡ ነገደ ፡ አኪየዜሪ ፡ [*ወዘኬሌግ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ኬሌጊ ፡*] ፡ ወዘኤሶርየል ፡
                  ነገደ ፡ ኤሶሪየሊ ፡ ወዘአሲኬም ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሲኬሚ ።

translations.lxx: To Esriel, the family of the Esrielites; to Sychem, the family of the Sychemites.
translations.kjv: These are the sons of Ephraim after their families: of Shuthelah, the family of the Shuthalhites: of Becher, the family of the Bachrites: of Tahan, the family of the Tahanites.

verses.geez: ወዘሲማዔር ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሲማዔሪ ፡ ወዘዖፌር ፡ ነገደ ፡ ዖፌሪ ።

translations.lxx: To Symaer, the family of the Symaerites; and to Opher, the family of the Opherites.
translations.kjv: And these are the sons of Shuthelah: of Eran, the family of the Eranites.

verses.geez:
ወለሰልጰአድ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዖፌር ፡ ኢተወልደ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ደቂቅ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ አዋልድ ፡ ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አስማቲሆን ፡
                  መሐላ ፡ ወኑሕ ፡ ወዔግላ ፡ ወሜልካ ፡ ወቴርሳ ።

translations.lxx: And to Salpaad the son of Opher there were no sons, but daughters: and these were the names of the daughters of Salpaad; Mala, and Nua, and Egla, and Melcha, and Thersa.
translations.kjv: These are the families of the sons of Ephraim according to those that were numbered of them, thirty and two thousand and five hundred. These are the sons of Joseph after their families.

verses.geez: ዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ማናሴ ፡ ወኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ፭፻-፻፳፻፯፻ ።

translations.lxx: These are the families of Manasse according to their numbering, fifty-two thousand and seven hundred.
translations.kjv: The sons of Benjamin after their families: of Bela, the family of the Belaites: of Ashbel, the family of the Ashbelites: of Ahiram, the family of the Ahiramites:

verses.geez: ወእሉ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ ዘሱታላ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሱታላይ ፡ ወዘጠነኅ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ጠነኂ ።

translations.lxx: And these are the children of Ephraim; to Suthala, the family of the Suthalanites; to Tanach, the family of the Tanachites.
translations.kjv: Of Shupham, the family of the Shuphamites: of Hupham, the family of the Huphamites.

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሴታላ ፡ (ወ)ዘኤዴን ፡ ነገደ ፡ ኤዴኒ ።

translations.lxx: These are the sons of Suthala; to Eden, the family of the Edenites.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Bela were Ard and Naaman: of Ard, the family of the Ardites: and of Naaman, the family of the Naamites.

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘኤፍሬም ፡ ወኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ፫፻-፻፳፻፭፻ ፡ እሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘደቂቀ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገዶሙ ።

translations.lxx: These are the families of Ephraim according to their numbering, thirty-two thousand and five hundred: these are the families of the children of Joseph according to their families.
translations.kjv: These are the sons of Benjamin after their families: and they that were numbered of them were forty and five thousand and six hundred.

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ ብንያሚ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገዶሙ ፡ ዘባዕል ፡ ነገደ ፡ በዓሊ ፡ ወዘአሲቤር ፡ ነገደ ፡ አሲቤሪ ፡ ወዘአኪራን ፡ ነገደ
                  ፡ አኪራኒ ።

translations.lxx: The sons of Benjamin according to their families; to Bale, the family of the Balites; to Asyber, the family of the Asyberites; to Jachiran, the family of the Jachiranites.
translations.kjv: These are the sons of Dan after their families: of Shuham, the family of the Shuhamites. These are the families of Dan after their families.

verses.geez: ወዘሳፋን ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሳፋኒ ።

translations.lxx: To Sophan, the family of the Sophanites.
translations.kjv: All the families of the Shuhamites, according to those that were numbered of them, were threescore and four thousand and four hundred.

verses.geez: ወኮኑ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ባዕል ፡ ዓዴር ፡ ወኖሔማን ፡ ነገደ ፡ ኖሔማኒ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Bale were Adar and Noeman; to Adar, the family of the Adarites; and to Noeman, the family of the Noemanites.
translations.kjv: Of the children of Asher after their families: of Jimna, the family of the Jimnites: of Jesui, the family of the Jesuites: of Beriah, the family of the Beriites.

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ብንያሚ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገዶሙ ፡ ወኍለቊሆሙ ፡ [፬፻-፻፶፻፯፻] ።

translations.lxx: These are the sons of Benjamin by their families according to their numbering, thirty-five thousand and five hundred.
translations.kjv: Of the sons of Beriah: of Heber, the family of the Heberites: of Malchiel, the family of the Malchielites.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ዳንሂ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገዶሙ ፡ ዘሳሚ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሳሚ ፡ እሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘዳን ፡ በበነገዶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Dan according to their families; to Same, the family of the Sameites; these are the families of Dan according to their families.
translations.kjv: And the name of the daughter of Asher was Sarah.

verses.geez: ወኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሳሚ ፡ ፯፻-፻፵፻፯፻ ።

translations.lxx: All the families of Samei according to their numbering, sixty-four thousand and four hundred.
translations.kjv: These are the families of the sons of Asher according to those that were numbered of them; who were fifty and three thousand and four hundred.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ንፍታሌምሂ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገዶሙ ፡ ዘአሴሔል ፡ ነገደ ፡ አሴሔሊ ፡ ወዘጎሂን ፡ ነገደ ፡ ጎሂኒ ።

translations.lxx: The sons of Nephthali according to their families; to Asiel, the family of the Asielites; to Gauni, the family of the Gaunites.
translations.kjv: Of the sons of Naphtali after their families: of Jahzeel, the family of the Jahzeelites: of Guni, the family of the Gunites:

verses.geez: ወዘዬሴር ፡ ነገደ ፡ ዬሴሪ ፡ ወዘሴሌም ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሴሌሚ ።

translations.lxx: To Jeser, the family of the Jeserites; to Sellem, the family of the Sellemites.
translations.kjv: Of Jezer, the family of the Jezerites: of Shillem, the family of the Shillemites.

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘንፍታሌም ፡ ወኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ፬፻-፻፶፻፬፻ ።

translations.lxx: These are the families of Nephthali, according to their numbering, forty thousand and three hundred.
translations.kjv: These are the families of Naphtali according to their families: and they that were numbered of them were forty and five thousand and four hundred.

verses.geez: ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ፷፻-፻፲፻[፯፻]፴ ።

translations.lxx: This is the numbering of the children of Israel, six hundred and one thousand and seven hundred and thirty.
translations.kjv: These were the numbered of the children of Israel, six hundred thousand and a thousand seven hundred and thirty.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez: እሉ ፡ ይወርስዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ በበ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ወበበ ፡ ኍልቈ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: To these the land shall be divided, so that they may inherit according to the number of the names.
translations.kjv: Unto these the land shall be divided for an inheritance according to the number of names.

verses.geez:
ለእለ ፡ ይበዝኁ ፡ ታበዝኅ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ወለእለ ፡ ይውኅዱ ፡ ታውኅድ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ወለለ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡
                  በአምጣነ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ትሁቦሙ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: To the greater number thou shalt give the greater inheritance, and to the less number thou shalt give the less inheritance: to each one, as they have been numbered, shall their inheritance be given.
translations.kjv: To many thou shalt give the more inheritance, and to few thou shalt give the less inheritance: to every one shall his inheritance be given according to those that were numbered of him.

verses.geez: ወበዕፆሙ ፡ ይረክቦሙ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ተሰምዩ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገደ ፡ አበዊሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: The land shall be divided to the names by lot, they shall inherit according to the tribes of their families.
translations.kjv: Notwithstanding the land shall be divided by lot: according to the names of the tribes of their fathers they shall inherit.

verses.geez: ወይወርሱ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ዘይረክቦሙ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ብዙኃን ፡ ወውሑዳን ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt divide their inheritance by lot between the many and the few.
translations.kjv: According to the lot shall the possession thereof be divided between many and few.

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ ሌዊሂ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገዶሙ ፡ ዘጌድሶን ፡ ነገደ ፡ ጌድሶኒ ፡ ወዘቃዓት ፡ ነገደ ፡ ቃዓቲ ፡ ወዘሜራር ፡ ነገደ ፡
                  ሜራሪ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Levi according to their families; to Gedson, the family of the Gedsonites; to Caath, the family of the Caathites; to Merari, the family of the Merarites.
translations.kjv: And these are they that were numbered of the Levites after their families: of Gershon, the family of the Gershonites: of Kohath, the family of the Kohathites: of Merari, the family of the Merarites.

verses.geez:
እሉ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሌዊ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሎቤኒ ፡ ወነገደ ፡ ኬብሮን ፡ ወነገደ ፡ ሐሙሲ ፡ ወነገደ ፡ ቆሬ ፡
                  ወቃዓት ፡ ወለዶ ፡ ለአንብረም ።

translations.lxx: These are the families of the sons of Levi; the family of the Lobenites, the family of the Chebronites, the family of the Coreites, and the family of the Musites; and Caath begot Amram.
translations.kjv: These are the families of the Levites: the family of the Libnites, the family of the Hebronites, the family of the Mahlites, the family of the Mushites, the family of the Korathites. And Kohath begat Amram.

verses.geez:
ወስማ ፡ ለብእሲተ ፡ አንብረም ፡ ዮከቤድ ፡ ወለተ ፡ ሌዊ ፡ እንተ ፡ ወለደቶሙ ፡ ለእሉ ፡ ለሌዊ ፡ በብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡
                  ወወለደት ፡ ሉቱ ፡ ለአንብረም ፡ አሮንሃ ፡ ወሙሴሃ ፡ ወማርያም ፡ እኅቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the name of his wife was Jochabed, daughter of Levi, who bore these to Levi in Egypt, and she bore to Amram, Aaron and Moses, and Mariam their sister.
translations.kjv: And the name of Amram’s wife was Jochebed, the daughter of Levi, whom her mother bare to Levi in Egypt: and she bare unto Amram Aaron and Moses, and Miriam their sister.

verses.geez: ወተወልዱ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ናዳብ ፡ ወአብዩድ ፡ ወእልዓዛር ፡ ወኢታመር ።

translations.lxx: And to Aaron were born both Nadab and Abiud, and Eleazar, and Ithamar.
translations.kjv: And unto Aaron was born Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

verses.geez: ወሞቱ ፡ ናዳብ ፡ ወአብዩድ ፡ አመ ፡ አብኡ ፡ እሳተ ፡ ዘእምባዕድ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በገዳም ፡ ዘሲና ።

translations.lxx: And Nadab and Abiud died when they offered strange fire before the Lord in the wilderness of Sina.
translations.kjv: And Nadab and Abihu died, when they offered strange fire before the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ፪፻-፻፴፻ኵሉ ፡ ተባዕት ፡ ዘእም፩ወርኅ ፡ ወላዕሉ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢተኈለቁ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ደቂቀ
                  ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢተውህበ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ መክፈልት ፡ ማእከሎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And there were according to their numbering, twenty-three thousand, every male from a month old and upward; for they were not numbered among the children of Israel, because they have no inheritance in the midst of the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: And those that were numbered of them were twenty and three thousand, all males from a month old and upward: for they were not numbered among the children of Israel, because there was no inheritance given them among the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወከመዝ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አስተፋቅዶሙ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለእልዓዛር ፡ ካህን ፡ እለ ፡ ኈለቍዎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በአረቦት
                  ፡ ዘሞአብ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ኢያሪኮ ።

translations.lxx: And this is the numbering of Moses and Eleazar the priest, who numbered the children of Israel in Araboth of Moab, at Jordan by Jericho.
translations.kjv: These are they that were numbered by Moses and Eleazar the priest, who numbered the children of Israel in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho.

verses.geez:
ወእምውስተ ፡ እሉ ፡ ኢተርፈ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ እምእለ ፡ ኈለቁ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ [ወአሮን ፡] እለ ፡ ኈለቍዎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል
                  ፡ በገዳም ፡ ዘሲና ።

translations.lxx: And among these there was not a man numbered by Moses and Aaron, whom, even the children of Israel, they numbered in the wilderness of Sinai.
translations.kjv: But among these there was not a man of them whom Moses and Aaron the priest numbered, when they numbered the children of Israel in the wilderness of Sinai.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ይቤሎሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ ሞተ ፡ [ይመውቱ ፡] በገዳም ፡ ወኢተርፈ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ወኢአሐዱ ፡ ዘእንበለ
                  ፡ ካሌብ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዬፎኒ ፡ ወዮሴዕ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ነዌ ።

translations.lxx: For the Lord said to them, They shall surely die in the wilderness; and there was not left even one of them, except Chaleb the son of Jephonne, and Joshua the son of Naue.
translations.kjv: For the LORD had said of them, They shall surely die in the wilderness. And there was not left a man of them, save Caleb the son of Jephunneh, and Joshua the son of Nun.
